description_long: This is a modern grave site featuring a polished black granite headstone with a curved top and an engraved portrait of a woman, along with Cyrillic inscriptions. The headstone is mounted at the end of a rectangular grave plot, which is bordered by a matching black granite frame. The interior of the grave plot is filled with a green turf or artificial grass, providing a neat and well-maintained appearance. The entire grave is set on a base of light gray stone tiles, creating a clean and defined boundary around the plot. The back of the headstone is plain and unadorned, while the front is highly detailed with inscriptions and imagery. The overall design is minimalist yet dignified, suitable for a contemporary urban cemetery.
description: A modern grave site with a polished black granite headstone featuring an engraved portrait and Cyrillic inscriptions, bordered by a granite frame and set on gray stone tiles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the headstone, the rectangular grave plot with green turf, and the tiled base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, and the full layout of the grave plot and tiled base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the headstone's profile, the grave plot, and the tiled surroundings.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the headstone and the tiled base.
